content.summary: User requested build test and hermes doctor diagnosis for MCP connection failures (igs, lifeos, postiz, razorpay, vercel). Local build passes clean (zero errors). SSH'd into VPS — discovered IGS dist/server.js (14669 lines) was built with esbuild in default ESM format, causing 'Dynamic require of events is not supported' crash when xml2js tried require('events'). Rebuilt with `npx esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:./node_modules/*` (129ms). New build is 164kb (external deps). Tested tools/list: 29 tools responding. Restarted IGS (PID 474103). Ran `hermes mcp list` — all 7 MCP servers now show '✓ enabled': context7, igs, lifeos, postiz, ishanparihar-com-mcp, razorpay, vercel. Root cause was the ESM bundle breaking xml2js require('events').
